d: Quantifies physical activity, competitive psychology, environmental adaptability, and sports community engagement.
a: Rank your top 5 most practiced sports in order of frequency.

Each sport has preset weights W[endurance, strength, skill]. For ranked items r[0..4] with rank_weight = [5,4,3,2,1]:
E = Σ W[r[i]].endur × rw[i]; S = Σ W[r[i]].str × rw[i]; K = Σ W[r[i]].skill × rw[i]
Normalize each to bit-width:
e3 = round(E/maxE × 7); s3 = round(S/maxS × 7); k2 = round(K/maxK × 3)
byte = (e3 << 5) | (s3 << 2) | k2
Which sports brands do you wear or prefer? Select all that apply.
How much do you typically spend on sports per month (gear, memberships, classes)?
What sportswear styles describe you? Select all that apply.
Performance / Technical|Streetwear / Athleisure|Retro / Vintage|Minimalist / Clean|Luxury Sport|Outdoor / Rugged|Compression / Pro|Eco-friendly

Bit map: [Technical=0, Streetwear=1, Retro=2, Minimal=3, Luxury=4, Outdoor=5, Pro=6, Eco=7]
byte = Σ(selected[i] ? 1 << BIT_MAP[i] : 0)
How many times per week do you exercise?
Rarely or never|1 – 2 times|3 – 4 times|5 – 6 times|7+ times (daily)
How long is your typical workout session?
Under 20 min|20 – 40 min|40 – 60 min|60 – 90 min|90+ min
How competitive are you when it comes to sports and fitness?
Just for fun & relaxation|I play to win, always
How much do you rely on wearable fitness technology?
Don't use any|Occasionally check stats|Regularly track workouts|Data-obsessed — every metric matters
How strict is your diet in support of your athletic goals?
I eat whatever I want|I try to be mindful of nutrition|I follow a structured meal plan|I track every macro precisely
Which recovery methods do you regularly use? Select all.
Stretching / Foam rolling|Ice bath / Cold therapy|Massage / Physio|Sauna / Heat therapy|Compression gear|Sleep optimization|Active rest days|Supplements
Where do you primarily work out?
How often do you watch live sports or sports media?
Never|Only major events (Olympics, World Cup)|Regularly follow a league|Hardcore fan — watch everything
Do you prefer working out alone or with others?
Always solo — I need my own space|Prefer being part of a team or group
How would you rate your tolerance for physical discomfort during exercise?
Very low — I stop at first sign of discomfort|Very high — I push through anything
How much do you crave adrenaline and extreme experiences in sports?
I prefer calm, low-risk activities|I live for extreme thrills and danger
How much do you seek out new places, routes, or environments for your workouts?
I like my familiar routine and spots|I'm constantly seeking new terrain and experiences
What primarily motivates your fitness — how you look or how you perform?
Physique & appearance first|Athletic performance & personal records first
When do you usually prefer to exercise?
Early morning (before 8am)|Mid-morning / Lunch|Afternoon|Evening / Night|No fixed pattern
Over the past year, how consistent has your exercise routine been?
Very inconsistent — long gaps|Somewhat regular with breaks|Highly consistent — rarely miss a week|Year-round daily without exception

high_4bit = [0,5,10,15][selected_index]  // mean level
low_4bit = inverse_variance_estimate  // 0=chaotic, 15=rock-solid
byte = (high_4bit << 4) | low_4bit
How much do past injuries or physical conditions limit your current training?
No limitations at all|Severely limiting — many activities are off-limits
m:
byte = round((freq_norm × 0.6 + dur_norm × 0.4) × 255)
where freq_norm = Sport_Frequency/255, dur_norm = Sport_Duration/255
byte = OR of bit flags per selected style

d: Extracts emotional baseline, auditory processing, cultural resonance, and sonic-detail sensitivity.
a: Rank your top 5 most-listened music genres.

Each genre has preset coords G[rhythm, melody, harmony]. For ranked r[0..4], rw=[5,4,3,2,1]:
R = Σ G[r[i]].rhy × rw[i]; M = Σ G[r[i]].mel × rw[i]; H = Σ G[r[i]].har × rw[i]
r3=round(R/maxR×7); m3=round(M/maxM×7); h2=round(H/maxH×3)
byte = (r3 << 5) | (m3 << 2) | h2
What emotional vibes do you most often seek in music? Select all.
Melancholic / Sad|Uplifting / Happy|Aggressive / Angry|Chill / Relaxed|Focused / Productive|Nostalgic|Romantic|Euphoric / Ecstatic

Map each vibe to Arousal-Valence coords. Average selected:
arousal_4bit = round(mean_arousal × 15)
valence_4bit = round(mean_valence × 15)
byte = (arousal_4bit << 4) | valence_4bit
Which music platform do you primarily use?
How invested are you in audio equipment quality?
Phone speaker is fine|Top-tier audiophile setup worth thousands
How often do you attend live concerts or music festivals?
Never|Once or twice a year|Every few months|Monthly or more
How many hours per day do you typically listen to music?
How mainstream vs. underground is your music taste?
I mostly listen to chart-toppers|I exclusively listen to obscure, underground artists
How much does your music taste define your social identity?
Music is a private pleasure|Music is central to how I present myself to others
Which instruments can you play? Select all.
None|Guitar|Piano / Keyboard|Drums / Percussion|Bass|Vocals|Violin / Strings|Electronic production / DJ

Bit map: [none=0(special), guitar=0, piano=1, drums=2, bass=3, vocals=4, violin=5, electronic=6, DJ=7]
If none selected: byte=0x00
Else: byte = Σ(1 << BIT_MAP[instrument])
How much do you rely on music to manage your emotions and mood?
Rarely — music is just entertainment|Extremely — music is my primary emotional coping tool
When you listen to music, how deeply do you pay attention?
Pure background noise — I barely notice it|Deep focused listening — I analyze every layer
How much attention do you pay to song lyrics and their meaning?
I only care about the melody and beat|I study every word and its deeper meaning
What era of music do you gravitate toward?
What tempo do you generally prefer?
Very slow & ambient (< 80 BPM)|Very fast & energetic (> 150 BPM)
How complex do you like your rhythms?
Simple, steady 4/4 beats|Complex polyrhythms and odd time signatures
How do you feel about playing the same song on repeat?
I move on after one listen|I can happily loop one song all day
Do you prefer instrumental tracks or vocal-driven music?
Pure instrumental / no vocals|Vocals are essential to every track
What sonic texture do you prefer in music production?
Lo-fi, raw, and grainy|Balanced / mixed|Hi-fi, polished, and pristine
How actively do you create and curate playlists?
I never create playlists — I use radio/shuffle|I'm an obsessive playlist curator with dozens of playlists
How do you primarily discover new music?
Algorithm recommendations (Discover Weekly, etc.)|Friends and social media|Actively dig through labels, blogs, Bandcamp|Music press, reviews, and critics

d: Evaluates visual aesthetics, creative expression, abstract comprehension, and beauty-value system.
a: Which visual/aesthetic styles resonate with you? Select all.
Minimalist / Clean|Maximalist / Ornate|Surrealist|Pop Art / Bold|Classical / Renaissance|Cyberpunk / Futuristic|Art Deco / Geometric|Wabi-sabi / Organic
Select or type artists/designers who define your taste (up to 10).
Freeform input + suggested: Banksy|Murakami|KAWS|Virgil Abloh|Yayoi Kusama|James Turrell|Olafur Eliasson|Zaha Hadid|Dieter Rams|Neri Oxman
How much do you spend annually on art, design objects, or visual media?
$0 — art isn't a spending priority|$1 – $100|$100 – $500|$500 – $2,000|$2,000+ — serious collector
What color palette are you most drawn to?
High saturation / bold primaries|Earth tones / warm neutrals|Muted / Morandi pastels|Monochrome / black & white|Neon / iridescent

Each palette has preset complexity+saturation coords:
byte = (complexity_4bit << 4) | saturation_4bit
Rank your top 3 most appreciated art mediums.
Painting / Illustration|Digital Art / 3D|Photography|Sculpture / Installation|Film / Video Art|Graphic Design|Architecture|Fashion Design|Ceramics / Craft

Mediums have preset axes [traditional, modern, digital].
byte = (trad_3bit << 5) | (mod_3bit << 2) | dig_2bit
When you evaluate design, what matters more — how it looks or how it works?
Pure function — beauty is irrelevant|Pure form — aesthetics above all else
How open are you to abstract and avant-garde art?
I only appreciate realistic, representational work|I love challenging, boundary-pushing experimental art
How do you feel about digital art and NFT art?
Strongly opposed — not real art|Actively collect and support digital/NFT art
What is your primary relationship with art?
Pure viewer / appreciator|Occasional hobbyist creator|Semi-professional / freelance|Full-time professional artist or designer
How often do you visit museums, galleries, or art exhibitions?
Never|Once or twice a year|Every few months|Monthly or more
How sensitive are you to visual details like alignment, spacing, and color accuracy?
I look at the big picture — details don't bother me|Every pixel and brushstroke matters to me
How strongly does art affect you emotionally?
I appreciate art intellectually — rarely emotional|Art regularly moves me deeply, even to tears
How interested are you in the context, history, and theory behind art?
I go purely by gut feeling|I deeply research the history and meaning behind every piece
If you create, how perfectionist are you about the output?
Done is better than perfect|I revise endlessly until every detail is right
If you create art, how often?
Never create|A few times a year|Monthly|Weekly|Daily
Do you prefer visual symmetry or asymmetry?
Perfect symmetry and order|Deliberate asymmetry and broken balance
When creating, do you enjoy the process or care more about the final output?
The creative process itself is the reward|Only the finished product matters
How do you feel about collaborative creative work?
I must work alone — my vision only|I love co-creating and building on others' ideas
Where do you primarily draw creative inspiration from?
Nature / landscapes|Urban environments / architecture|Dreams / inner world|Other artists' work|Science / technology|Culture / travel
What primarily motivates your creative output?
I don't create|Self-expression / therapy|Commercial / career|Social commentary / activism|Pure exploration / play
m:
byte = round((role_weight × 0.5 + freq_norm × 0.5) × 255)
role_weight: viewer=0, hobbyist=0.33, semi-pro=0.66, pro=1.0

byte = (complexity_4bit << 4) | saturation_4bit
complexity: minimal=1..ornate=15; saturation: muted=1..vivid=15
byte = Σ(1 << medium_index) for selected mediums

d: Dissects information intake patterns, knowledge depth, critical thinking, and attention span.
a: Rank your top 5 fiction genres by preference.
Science Fiction|Fantasy|Mystery / Thriller|Literary Fiction|Romance|Horror|Historical Fiction|Adventure|Satire / Comedy|Graphic Novels / Manga

Genres have preset axes [imagination, logic, emotion].
byte = (imag_3bit << 5) | (logic_3bit << 2) | emo_2bit
Business / Startups|Technology / AI|History|Philosophy|Psychology / Neuroscience|Science|Politics / Economics|Self-help / Productivity|Biography / Memoir|Health / Fitness

Topics have preset axes [practical, theoretical].
byte = (practical_4bit << 4) | theoretical_4bit
Where do you get most of your reading content? Select all.
X / Twitter|Reddit|Substack / Newsletters|Legacy media (NYT, BBC)|Academic papers / journals|Podcasts (transcripts)|Books only|YouTube / video transcripts
How long can you focus on a single piece of written content?
Headlines and TL;DRs only|I can read 10,000+ word essays in one sitting
How much do you read per month (all formats)?
Almost nothing|1 – 2 books or equivalent|3 – 4 books|5 – 8 books|8+ books — voracious reader
How skeptical are you of what you read?
I generally trust what I read at face value|I question everything and verify claims independently
How actively do you seek out viewpoints that challenge your own?
I mostly read things I already agree with|I actively seek out opposing perspectives
What's your reading split between fiction and non-fiction?
How systematically do you capture and organize what you read?
I just read and move on|I maintain a complex personal knowledge base (Obsidian, Notion, Zettelkasten)
Physical paper books|E-reader (Kindle, etc.)|Phone / tablet apps|Audiobooks|Web browser / RSS
How often do you share, review, or discuss what you've read?
I digest everything privately|I write reviews, share highlights, and discuss actively
How often do you finish a book once you've started it?
I rarely finish — I jump between many books|I always finish every book I start
Do you read for speed or deep comprehension?
Speed-skim to cover more ground|Slow, deliberate reading for full understanding
How do you react to dense, technical, or academic writing?
I avoid it — too frustrating|I enjoy the challenge of complex material
How often do you follow the news?
I actively avoid news|Check occasionally|Daily reader|Constant refresh throughout the day
How often do you re-read books or articles?
Never — too much new stuff to read|Frequently — I love revisiting favorites
In how many languages do you regularly read?
In fiction, what do you value more?
Deep, complex character development|Fast-paced, plot-driven narrative
Where do you prefer to read?
Absolute silence (home, library)|Background noise (café, park)|Commuting (train, bus)|In bed before sleep
How do you typically acquire reading material?
Library / free sources only|I compulsively buy far more books than I can read
m: byte = cluster_ID from predefined 256-entry cognitive-style lookup

d: Quantifies lifestyle refinement, health awareness, cultural openness, and sensory-pleasure priority.
a:
Cuisines have preset axes [eastern, western, spice].
byte = (eastern_3bit << 5) | (western_3bit << 2) | spice_2bit
Do you follow any dietary restrictions? Select all.
byte = Σ(selected[i] ? 1 << i : 0)  // skip "None" if selected alone → 0x00
Which food brands or restaurant chains do you frequent? Select all.
Starbucks|McDonald's|Chipotle|Sweetgreen|Din Tai Fung|Shake Shack|Whole Foods|Trader Joe's|Local independent only|Blue Bottle|Eataly
How do you feel about high-end / fine dining experiences?
Overpriced waste of money|Gladly invest in Michelin-star experiences
What drives your food choices more — health or pleasure?
Strict calorie and macro tracking|Pure taste and enjoyment — life is short
How often do you eat at restaurants per week?
How often do you cook at home per week?
Never / almost never|1 – 2 times|3 – 5 times|Almost every day
How adventurous are you with unfamiliar foods?
I stick to what I know|I'll try anything — insects, organ meats, the unknown
How dependent are you on caffeine?
I don't drink coffee or tea|I get a headache without my daily dose
How often do you consume alcohol?
Never (teetotal)|Rarely (special occasions)|Moderate (1 – 3 drinks / week)|Regularly (daily or near-daily)
How much do you care about where your food comes from?
Cheapest option wins|I insist on organic, local, farm-direct sourcing
What level of flavor intensity do you prefer?
Mild, clean, subtle flavors|Heavy, bold, extremely spicy
Would you rather eat quickly or eat well?
Convenience store meals are perfectly fine|I'd happily wait 2 hours for an exceptional meal
Is eating primarily a solo or social activity for you?
I prefer eating alone|For me, meals are primarily about socializing
How important is food presentation and plating to you?
Taste is all that matters|Camera eats first — plating must be beautiful
How strong is your sweet tooth?
I avoid sweet food entirely|I crave sweets daily
What portion of your income goes to food?
Minimal — I eat cheaply|Very high — food is my biggest discretionary expense
How regular are your meal times?
Completely irregular — I eat whenever|Exact same times every single day

high_4bit = round(regularity_score × 15)
low_4bit = round(variance_inverse × 15)
byte = (high_4bit << 4) | low_4bit
How often do you eat late at night?
Never — I don't eat after dinner|Almost every night
What food textures do you enjoy most? Select all.
Crispy / Crunchy|Soft / Creamy|Chewy / Elastic|Melt-in-mouth|Firm / Snappy|Flaky / Layered

d: Quantifies comfort-zone boundaries, uncertainty tolerance, planning ability, and spending philosophy.
a: Rank your top 3 preferred travel styles.

City exploration / culture|Beach / island resort|Outdoor adventure / hiking|Road trip / van life|Luxury retreat / spa|Backpacking / budget|Food & wine tourism|Eco-tourism / voluntourism|Cruise / sailing

Styles have preset axes [relaxation, exertion, culture].
byte = (relax_3bit << 5) | (exert_3bit << 2) | culture_2bit
5-star or nothing — comfort is non-negotiable|Hostel, couchsurf, sleep on beaches — adventure over comfort
Which travel brands/tools do you use regularly? Select all.
Airbnb|Booking.com|Uber / Lyft|Google Maps|Rimowa / Away|Marriott / Hilton|Skyscanner|Lonely Planet|Hostelworld|TripAdvisor
How often do you travel for leisure?
Rarely — less than once a year|Once a year|2 – 3 times per year|Monthly or more
How central is food to your travel experiences?
I eat to survive while traveling|Travel IS eating — I plan entire trips around restaurants
How much do you plan before a trip?
Completely spontaneous — book a one-way ticket and figure it out|Minute-by-minute itinerary in a spreadsheet
Do you prefer tourist attractions or local experiences?
Must-see landmarks and popular spots|Deep immersion in local daily life
How do you handle unexpected disruptions while traveling?
Flight cancelled = total meltdown|Disruptions are part of the adventure — I embrace chaos
Do you prefer traveling alone or with others?
Solo only — I need full independence|Must have companions — I don't travel alone
What types of accommodation are you comfortable with? Select all.
5-star luxury hotel|Boutique / design hotel|Airbnb / vacation rental|Hostel / shared dorm|Camping / glamping|Couchsurfing|Ryokan / unique stays
Do you prefer natural landscapes or urban environments when traveling?
Pure wilderness — mountains, forests, oceans|Vibrant cities — culture, nightlife, architecture
How connected are you to technology while traveling?
Full digital detox — phone stays off|Always on — Google Maps, Instagram stories, constant connectivity
How willing are you to interact with strangers while traveling?
Headphones in — I keep to myself|I actively chat with locals and fellow travelers
How comfortable are you traveling where you don't speak the language?
Only travel where I speak the language or English|I'll figure it out with gestures — language barriers are fun
How much do you photograph while traveling?
I experience with my eyes — rarely take photos|I obsessively document everything for content
What pace do you prefer when traveling?
Packed schedule — 5+ activities per day|Slow travel — sit in a café all afternoon
Do you prefer new destinations or revisiting favorites?
Always somewhere new — the world is too big to repeat|I love returning to the same beloved places
Do you buy souvenirs or local goods when traveling?
Never — experiences over things|I buy local crafts, art, and specialty items everywhere I go
Which transport modes do you enjoy using? Select all.
Flights|High-speed rail|Self-drive / road trip|Walking / hiking|Bicycle|Ferry / cruise|Motorcycle|Public transit
How do you pack for a trip?
Ultra-light — one carry-on for any trip length|I bring everything I might possibly need

d: Core agent-economy parameter — quantifies risk appetite, delayed gratification, time preference, and new-asset cognition.
a: What is your overall financial risk tolerance?
Ultra-conservative — protect principal at all costs|Ultra-aggressive — willing to risk total loss for outsized returns
Which asset classes do you currently hold or actively invest in? Select all.
Cash / Savings|Real estate / REITs|Stocks / ETFs|Bonds / Fixed income|Crypto / Digital assets|Commodities (gold, oil)|Private equity / VC|Art / Collectibles
Which financial platforms do you actively use? Select all.
Robinhood|E*TRADE / Schwab|Binance|Coinbase|Interactive Brokers|Wealthfront / Betterment|MetaMask / DeFi|Traditional bank only
What is your conviction level in cryptocurrency and Web3?
It's mostly a scam / bubble|All-in — crypto is the future of finance
What is your typical investment holding period?
Intraday / day trading|Hold for 10+ years — extreme patience
What percentage of your income do you save or invest each month?
0% — paycheck to paycheck|60%+ — extreme saver / FIRE pursuer
How susceptible are you to investment FOMO?
Completely calm — I stick to my plan regardless|I panic-buy when I see others profiting
How do you make investment decisions?
Pure gut instinct / tips from friends|Rigorous quantitative analysis / models
If your portfolio dropped 20% in a week, what would you do?
Panic sell everything|Freeze — don't look at it|Hold steady — trust the thesis|Excitedly buy more at a discount
Where do you get financial information? Select all.
Bloomberg / Reuters|WSJ / FT|Twitter / X (Fintwit)|Reddit (WSB, etc.)|YouTube / podcasts|Paid research / alpha groups|On-chain analytics|Friends / word of mouth
How many hours per week do you spend researching investments?
0 — I don't research|15+ hours — it's a major time commitment
How often do you use leverage (margin, options, futures)?
Never — I only invest cash I own|Regularly use significant leverage
Are you a trend-follower or contrarian investor?
I follow momentum and hot sectors|I buy what nobody else wants — blood in the streets
How important are ethical / ESG considerations in your investments?
Returns are all that matter|I refuse to invest in companies that harm society or environment
What is your primary financial goal?
Preserve wealth / beat inflation|Buy property / major purchase|Achieve financial independence (FIRE)|Build generational wealth|Fund a business or cause
How much do you trust automated investing tools?
All manual — I control every trade|Fully automated — DCA bots, robo-advisors, grid trading
What is your attitude toward debt?
Absolutely zero debt — ever|Strategically use debt as a leverage tool
How often do you actively trade?
Rarely — check portfolio quarterly|Monthly rebalancing|Weekly trades|Multiple trades per day
If you received an unexpected $10,000, what would you do?
Spend it — treat myself|Save it all|Invest conservatively|YOLO into high-risk bets
How much does money cause you stress or anxiety?
I never worry about money|I experience daily financial stress
m:
byte = (freq_4bit << 4) | analysis_4bit
freq: long-hold=0..day-trade=15; analysis: fundamental=0..quant=15

d: Quantifies systems thinking, resource allocation, frustration resilience, team strategy, and multitasking capacity.
a: Rank your top 3 most-played game genres.
RPG (Action/JRPG/CRPG)|FPS / Shooter|MOBA|Battle Royale|RTS / Strategy|Puzzle / Casual|Racing / Sports|Simulation / Builder|Survival / Horror|Fighting|MMO|Roguelike / Roguelite

Genres have preset axes [reflexes, strategy, narrative].
byte = (reflex_3bit << 5) | (strategy_3bit << 2) | narrative_2bit
Which game franchises define your taste? Select all.
Zelda|Dark Souls / Elden Ring|GTA / Red Dead|League of Legends|Valorant / CS|Final Fantasy|Minecraft|Call of Duty|FIFA / EA Sports|Pokémon|God of War|Baldur's Gate
How much do you spend on in-game purchases?
Strictly F2P — never pay|Light spender (battle pass, skins)|Moderate (regular purchases)|Whale (significant spending)
Which gaming platforms do you use? Select all.
PC|PlayStation|Xbox|Nintendo Switch|Mobile (iOS/Android)|VR (Quest, PSVR)|Steam Deck / handheld|Cloud gaming
How many hours per week do you game?
What difficulty level do you prefer?
Easy / Story mode — I'm here for the narrative|Maximum difficulty — I thrive on punishment (Soulslike)
What drives you more in games — exploring the world or defeating other players?
Exploration, discovery, puzzle-solving|Competitive PvP — I want to dominate others
What motivates you more — collecting achievements or socializing?
Achievements, completions, leaderboards|Guild chat, co-op, community building
How much do you optimize your builds and strategies?
Casual — I go with what feels fun|I math out every stat for the optimal meta build
In team games, what role do you prefer?
Tank / Frontline|Healer / Support|DPS / Carry|Shot-caller / Leader|Flex — whatever's needed
How often do you tilt, rage, or get frustrated while gaming?
Zen calm — nothing bothers me|I frequently rage-quit or flame teammates
How compelled are you to fully complete games?
Beat the main story and I'm done|Must unlock every achievement, secret, and collectible
How engaged are you with game stories and lore?
Skip all cutscenes and dialogue|Read every codex entry, note, and lore document
How far ahead do you plan in games?
Rush in and improvise|Plan 10 moves ahead — careful resource management
Do you prefer single-player or multiplayer?
Solo immersion — I game alone|Multiplayer only — games are social
What's your stance on blockchain gaming and play-to-earn?
Strongly opposed — NFTs ruin games|Actively participate in play-to-earn ecosystems
How much gaming content do you watch vs play?
I only play — never watch|I watch streams and esports more than I actually play
How much do you customize and mod your games?
Vanilla only — play as the developers intended|Dozens of mods — I rebuild the game my way
How often do you try new games?
I play the same 2 – 3 games for years|I'm constantly buying and trying new releases
How long is your typical gaming session?
Quick bursts (10 – 30 min)|1 – 2 hours|3 – 5 hours|All-night marathon (6+ hours)

d: Probes knowledge anxiety, skill-iteration speed, authority attitude, and intrinsic lifelong-learning motivation.
a: Rank your top 3 current learning interests.

Programming / CS|Data Science / AI|Design / UX|Business / MBA|Marketing / Growth|Finance / Investing|Languages|History / Philosophy|Health / Nutrition|Music / Art|Writing / Communication|Engineering / Hardware

Domains have preset axes [technical, creative, business].
byte = (tech_3bit << 5) | (creative_3bit << 2) | biz_2bit
Which learning platforms do you regularly use? Select all.
How much do you spend annually on learning and education?
$0 — free resources only|$1 – $100|$100 – $500|$500 – $2,000|$2,000+ — heavy investor in self-education
Rank these learning methods by effectiveness for you.
Watching video tutorials|Reading articles / books|Hands-on projects / building|Listening to lectures / podcasts

VARK model weights: V(visual)=video, A(aural)=listen, R(read)=text, K(kinesthetic)=hands-on.
byte = (V_2bit << 6) | (A_2bit << 4) | (R_2bit << 2) | K_2bit
How many hours per week do you spend on self-directed learning?
How much do you rely on AI tools (ChatGPT, etc.) for learning?
I research and think through problems myself|AI is my primary learning assistant for everything
How often do you actually finish online courses you start?
Almost never — I buy courses and abandon them|Always — I complete 100% of every course I start
Do you go deep in one field or spread across many?
Deep specialist — master one domain|Broad generalist — learn a little about everything
When you hit a wall while learning something difficult, what do you do?
Give up quickly and try something else|Grind relentlessly until I understand — no matter how long
How quickly do you apply or share what you learn?
I mostly consume — rarely create or apply|I immediately write, build, or teach what I learn
Career advancement / salary|Solve a specific current problem|Pure intellectual curiosity|Anxiety about falling behind
How important are certificates, badges, and credentials to you?
Knowledge is the reward — I don't need certificates|I need the credential for my LinkedIn / CV
How do you prefer to learn?
Follow a structured curriculum step-by-step|Piece it together myself from Google, YouTube, and forums
How sophisticated is your note-taking / knowledge management system?
No notes — I just try to remember|Complex system (Obsidian, Notion, Zettelkasten)
What makes you trust a learning source?
Credentials and prestige (Ivy League, famous expert)|Quality of argument regardless of source
Do you learn better alone or with others?
Strictly solo — self-paced, independent study|I thrive in cohorts, bootcamps, and study groups
How quickly do you apply what you learn?
I accumulate knowledge but rarely apply it|I can't wait to use new skills at work tomorrow
How formally do you set learning goals?
I learn by feel — no specific goals|Strict OKRs, timelines, and learning roadmaps
How often do you feel like you don't know enough — despite your actual skills?
Rarely — I'm confident in what I know|Constantly — I always feel like a fraud
What length of learning content do you prefer?
TikTok-length clips (< 3 min)|3-hour hardcore academic lectures
m:
byte = Σ(modality[i] ? 1 << i : 0)
Bit mapping: visual=0, auditory=1, kinesthetic=2, reading=3, career=4, curiosity=5

byte = (depth_4bit << 4) | breadth_delta_4bit
depth: beginner=0..master=15; breadth: static=0..rapid-switch=15
